title: AQ_TRACE_ID auto-seeding at every entrypoint
files_touched: scripts/ai/lib/dispatch.py (opens delegate.<mode> root span; model.generate nests)
live_path_wired: aq/delegate-to-local/aq-loop seed AQ_TRACE_ID -> exported to child dispatch.py -> root span delegate.<mode> + child model.generate emit to the A2A event bus -> queryable at /api/trace/{id} on the live dashboard.

test_evidence.live: seeded a real delegation (trace ce14076c...); delegate.direct root span emitted to the event log and rendered in the live /api/trace endpoint (found=true), correctly showing in-flight/incomplete while queued behind the busy slot

activation_gate.observable: trace events on the A2A bus; /api/trace/{id}; aq-event tail shows trace=
activation_gate.intervenable: AQ_TRACE_DISABLE=1 (opt-out); AQ_TRACE_ID inherited to share one trace per chain

rollback: Set AQ_TRACE_DISABLE=1 to stop seeding (spans become no-ops). Full revert: remove the 3 `source trace-seed.sh` lines + the dispatch root-span block; the trace lib and event bus are unaffected.
deferred: R5.2 (span switchboard + remote/tool layers; wire OTLP export to the running ai-tempo/ai-otel-collector) — remote-lane tracing is the follow-up; R5.1 covers local/loop entrypoints.
